summary: Iteration 53 - Push Notifications Feature Testing. All 7 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend NotificationCenter component tested successfully - bell icon, unread badge, dropdown, notification items, and mark-all-read functionality all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/cooperative/members/{member_id}/parcels correctly triggers notification storage in notification_history collection
GET /api/notifications/history returns notifications with all required fields: _id, title, body, type, read, created_at
PUT /api/notifications/history/{id}/read correctly marks single notification as read
PUT /api/notifications/history/read-all correctly marks all notifications as read
Frontend NotificationCenter bell icon displays correctly in cooperative dashboard header
Frontend unread badge shows correct count and animates with pulse effect
Frontend dropdown opens on bell click and shows notification items with proper styling
Frontend mark-all-read button ('Tout lire') works correctly and badge disappears after use
Notification type 'new_parcel_to_verify' is correctly used for parcel creation notifications
push_notifications.py send_new_parcel_notification_to_agents method stores notifications in notification_history for each agent
seed_data_creation: Created test parcels during testing to trigger notifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notification feature is fully functional. When a parcel is created via POST /api/cooperative/members/{member_id}/parcels, notifications are stored in notification_history collection with type 'new_parcel_to_verify'. The NotificationCenter component in the frontend correctly displays these notifications with bell icon, unread badge, and dropdown functionality.

mocked_api_note.Expo Push Notifications: MOCKED (no physical device, but notifications are stored in DB)

notification_history.GET /api/notifications/history: PASS - Returns notifications with _id, title, body, type, read, created_at

parcel_creation_with_notification.POST /api/cooperative/members/{member_id: PASS - Creates parcel AND stores notification in notification_history

mark_notification_read.PUT /api/notifications/history/{id}/read: PASS - Marks single notification as read

mark_all_notifications_read.PUT /api/notifications/history/read-all: PASS - Marks all notifications as read, returns {success: true, updated: <count>}

notification_center_component.notification_content: PASS - Shows 'Nouvelle parcelle à vérifier' with farmer name, area, crop type
notification_center_component.mark_all_read_action: PASS - Badge disappears after clicking 'Tout lire'
notification_center_component.dropdown_close: PASS - Dropdown closes when clicking outside

notification_structure_verified.title: string - e.g., 'Nouvelle parcelle à vérifier'
notification_structure_verified.body: string - e.g., 'KINDA YABRE - 2.5 ha de cacao à Test Village'
notification_structure_verified.read: boolean - false for unread, true for read
notification_structure_verified.user_id: string - ID of user receiving notification
notification_structure_verified.data: object - optional, contains parcel_id, cooperative_id, screen for navigation
